beats.intent: move from page context to disputed detail
beats.visual_action: App screenshot holds full context while the HyperFrames phone frame, source card, grid background, and small icon cluster guide attention toward the lower ad area

motion.entrance: continue from previous HyperFrames phone-frame position
motion.main: grid drifts slowly; source card settles; icon cluster ticks once; screenshot scales from 1.0 to 1.12 and shifts upward so ad slot approaches center

beats.density_note: readable dense: screenshot is stable; background, source card, icons, and camera add life without stealing focus
beats.why_not_ppt: the viewer travels from the real App page into the exact disputed ad slot instead of seeing a static label

beats.narration: 预警页下方出现了广告
beats.intent: lock attention on the disputed detail
beats.visual_action: HyperFrames-native red box draws around the ad slot; warning chip pops in; red keyword '广告' snaps beside the boxed region on the spoken word

motion.main: warning chip pops, keyword lands with small scale overshoot, red box pulses once then holds

beats.density_note: annotation, chip, and text are generated by HyperFrames and serve the screenshot; screenshot remains the focal proof
beats.why_not_ppt: the evidence is directed with zoom, lock, and attached label instead of being pasted as a static screenshot
